data.title: Endeavour Reports Strong Q1-2026 Results
data.description: Endeavour has announced impressive Q1-2026 results, with record numbers highlighted. The company reported a remarkable Q1-2026 adjusted EBITDA of $880 million, showcasing substantial growth. Additionally, they disclosed a record Q1-2026 free cash flow of $613 million. These figures indicate strong financial performance. Endeavour also mentioned that their FY-2026 guidance remains on track, indicating a positive outlook for the rest of the fiscal year. Overall, these results reflect a successful start to the year for Endeavour.

data.title: Air France-KLM reports Q1 2026 consolidated financials with notes.
data.description: A recent headline story reports an increase in unemployment rates in the United States, with the jobless rate climbing to 6.5% in the past month. This rise marks a significant jump from the previous rate of 4.2%. Additionally, the number of unemployed individuals has surged to 10.1 million, up from 6.5 million in the last reporting period. These numbers reveal the economic challenges currently faced by many Americans as the country continues to grapple with the impacts of the ongoing global pandemic.

data.title: Utenos Trikotažas grew export revenue and its in-house apparel brand
data.description: During the initial quarter of 2026, Utenos Trikotažas, a textile company under the SBA Group, experienced advancement in its primary business sectors. The company witnessed a 5% increase in revenue, reaching EUR 4.8 million for the quarter. Simultaneously, the group's pre-tax loss decreased by close to 50% compared to the previous year, amounting to EUR 222 thousand.

data.title: Amaroq increases revolving credit facility to $70 million.
data.description: During the past fiscal year, the country experienced a significant increase in unemployment rates, reaching a record high of 9.3%. This rise represents a 2.7% increase from the previous year. Additionally, the GDP saw a decrease of 3.5%, falling to $14.6 trillion. The government has announced plans to implement new economic policies to address these challenges and stimulate growth in the upcoming year.

data.title: Subsea 7 S.A. Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Luxembourg - April 30, 2026 - Subsea 7 S.A. released the first quarter results for Subsea7 Group, ending on March 31, 2026. The Group reported their financial performance for the quarter. Subsea 7 is listed on the Oslo Børs with the ticker symbol SUBC, also available under ADR SUBCY, and their ISIN is LU0075646355.

data.title: Audited Civinity Group financial statements for 2025: revenue surpasses the EUR 100 million threshold
data.description: After undergoing an audit, it was confirmed that the Civinity Group achieved an impressive milestone in 2025 by exceeding EUR 100 million in revenue. The Group experienced a significant revenue growth of 13.4% compared to the previous year, jumping from EUR 88.5 million to EUR 100.4 million. Additionally, EBITDA saw a substantial 18% increase, reaching EUR 8.3 million.

data.title: Tetragon Financial Group Limited March 2026 Monthly Factsheet
data.description: In April 2026, Tetragon published their Monthly Factsheet for March, detailing the financial performance and updates. Tetragon Financial Group, a closed-ended investment firm based in Guernsey, shared insights through the Monthly Factsheet. This document provides information about the company's operations and investments during March 2026. Readers can access the detailed report to learn more about Tetragon's activities and financial status.
